race.comment: SMOKE SCREEN (11) is knocking on the door with two minor placings this time in, beaten a head into third over 1000m at Caulfield Heath. Drawn low again, she'll have a strong fitness edge and take holding out. BEE ADMIRED (9) was well supported on debut last start and turned in a strong effort to finish second over 1100m at this track. Can roll forward from a middle gate and be in this for a long way. UNRIDDLE (2) has had a few chances but keeps racing well, again finding one better at Ballarat last time. He can figure again. SUPER LUCK DRAGON (1) is a HK import having his first start for Clayton Douglas. Has jumped out sharply in readiness. Have to keep on-side.
